title: Actionable product improvements from survey responses
use_when: Actionable product improvements from survey responses. Use when the user needs a product workflow for user research related to actionable product improvements from survey responses. Trigger terms: user-research, surveys, insights.
do_not_use_when: Do not use Actionable product improvements from survey responses when the request is mainly delivery planning, analytics readout, or stakeholder communication; route to the narrower Productize skill that owns that artifact instead. Do not use it when the user lacks enough context to distinguish facts, assumptions, and decision risk.
output_artifact: Actionable product improvements from survey responses research brief with evidence, insight clusters, assumptions, and next validation steps
framework_fit: Actionable product improvements from survey responses fits Discovery work in the Discover lifecycle when the user needs Actionable product improvements from survey responses research brief with evidence, insight clusters, assumptions, and next validation steps and has enough product context to make tradeoffs explicit. Use it to produce a decision-ready artifact, not a framework tour.
failure_modes: Produces Actionable product improvements from survey responses research brief with evidence, insight clusters, assumptions, and next validation steps without tying recommendations to the user's Discover stage, evidence, and decision pressure.
Treats Actionable product improvements from survey responses as generic Discovery advice instead of naming assumptions, missing inputs, risks, and the next validation step.
Fails to route away from Actionable product improvements from survey responses when another Productize skill owns the requested artifact more directly.
